name: fluxgrid
description: FLUXGRID — Anonymous conversation in the void. Launch 2026.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix client && npm start --prefix server
scripts.start:prod: npm run build --prefix client && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm start --prefix server
scripts.deploy:check: npm run build --prefix client && node --check server/src/index.js
